name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20for=20Jon=20Ossoff?=
subject: We Can't Let Republicans Steal Another Election in Georgia
body:
No Democrat has been elected to the Senate from Georgia in 20 years | | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=31483300e5&e=3f151f8b74 "DONATE")
---
| | | [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=403761ddd4&e=3f151f8b74)
---
The runoff elections will take place on Tuesday, January 5, 2021.
|
---
|
---
| Friends,

Thanksgiving was different this year than any other year before. Americans across the country were not able to celebrate with their loved ones because of our Government's failure to contain the spread of the virus.

We are thinking about our hard working farm workers who put food on our table this year, working mothers across America who couldn’t give their children a Thanksgiving dinner, families who lost a loved one during this pandemic and those frontline workers who risk their lives to keep our communities safe.

Too much is at stake and our Republican controlled Senate refuses to act.

This election is not over until we flip Georgia blue and Moms in Office is ready to fight to get Jon Ossoff elected. Why is this so important not just for working moms fighting for paid leave, universal preschool and access to healthcare, but for all Americans who need to build back their lives after one of the most devastating economic downturns in our country's history? Because the outcome of the runoff on January 5th, two weeks before President-elect Joe Biden's inauguration, could swing the majority to Democrats and give President Biden broad power to carry out his policy agenda. We simply can't let Republicans continue to stand in the way of progress. With the endorsements of his mentor Congressman John Lewis, Congressman Hank Johnson, Georgia State Legislative Black Caucus Chair Rep. Karen Bennett, and dozens of other leaders from around Georgia, Ossoff is challenging Senator David Perdue on January 5th, 2021. **We can flip Georgia Blue and get Jon elected, but we can't do it without you.[Chip in today](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=307c8571ee&e=3f151f8b74). Every Dollar matters.**

With Gratitude,

Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office

**_The Solution:_** _I 'm helping our Senate GOP reach out to top conservatives, like you, to ask for your support so that the Republican grassroots teams on the ground in Georgia get resources they need before the deadline.
_
**If they fail to reach this goal and the Senate goes to a 50-50 split, Kamala Harris could be the deciding vote in the U.S. Senate. body:
Friend,

subject: We’re not in the clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Nancy Pelosi is dead set on defeating us and this seat remains a top-target. We won by the smallest of margins -- only a couple thousand votes.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OoYtNsxchZ5YAXjgOrql400KMcQRJEFBMsMPSpZLOZEdihbtLhX3GpJHQl2FcXSb3rbc-Hl5by5eGo1_9QIufvqineOPsMpqc6ymdOGukwuE0S70Lys7c3eVbC1QwWNsVPAm_aMlVPqf7Wt9eP1BSEVVyBguhyLhHwALrocCajwg5ehALYFT9XKFET2QNGuIO5Yj5NOiWpYH2o3XX67tPiXGmQJsl3-SKuvsxWEuQLD8pFxndohnG5kIB2r1IA-5VVPbM5CNGVNOW7ESn3Nhsm8s3dTkEpzmPEXHp6hDT1HZzyj4R1zosTSHObkO036amPkXGl2hQ7ymWVkA9z-DAtixZtNs3M_6uAc5Iz53o098TqQ-AwlmRjOSsa9fdRk9yY1xKnTHZVHZl0s22_qzPN44nsofw1c0hPepvIgsEKs=&c=6gh3MRehpU7nz5tdZBwfFbROsKD-JzvOcpMotV-bgIwfT6IaftDiaw==&ch=dJiuLy2QMnID-wHhUUM1jtq0ev9-SuHhmQIZuSANQD9G3YfChudnMw==)

Friend,

In 2019, We set out to do the impossible. We set out to flip California's 39th Congressional District RED, a seat only recently turned blue by Nancy Pelosi and a self-funded millionaire opponent.

They spent millions in dark money, tapped into our opponent's personal fortune, and spent $12+ million to defeat us -- but despite their best efforts and outspending us at every turn, _we won. _

But we're not in the clear. Nancy Pelosi is dead set on defeating us and this seat remains a top-target. We won by the smallest of margins -- only a couple thousand votes. **[Can you chip in to our Grassroots Victory Fund, Friend, to defend this seat from the Far Left and take back the House Majority?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OoYtNsxchZ5YAXjgOrql400KMcQRJEFBMsMPSpZLOZEdihbtLhX3GpJHQl2FcXSb3rbc-Hl5by5eGo1_9QIufvqineOPsMpqc6ymdOGukwuE0S70Lys7c3eVbC1QwWNsVPAm_aMlVPqf7Wt9eP1BSEVVyBguhyLhHwALrocCajwg5ehALYFT9XKFET2QNGuIO5Yj5NOiWpYH2o3XX67tPiXGmQJsl3-SKuvsxWEuQLD8pFxndohnG5kIB2r1IA-5VVPbM5CNGVNOW7ESn3Nhsm8s3dTkEpzmPEXHp6hDT1HZzyj4R1zosTSHObkO036amPkXGl2hQ7ymWVkA9z-DAtixZtNs3M_6uAc5Iz53o098TqQ-AwlmRjOSsa9fdRk9yY1xKnTHZVHZl0s22_qzPN44nsofw1c0hPepvIgsEKs=&c=6gh3MRehpU7nz5tdZBwfFbROsKD-JzvOcpMotV-bgIwfT6IaftDiaw==&ch=dJiuLy2QMnID-wHhUUM1jtq0ev9-SuHhmQIZuSANQD9G3YfChudnMw==) **Our end of month deadline is Sunday at midnight -- that's just two days away! -- and we're short of where we need to be.

Once again, we're facing one of the toughest races in the nation and now that we're only a handful of seats away from reclaiming the House Majority, it's more important than ever. Nancy Pelosi has already spent millions trying to defeat us and she's preparing to spend even more to buy this seat outright because the fate of the House Majority could come down to who wins this seat!

With an uphill battle ahead of us, we're going to need all hands on deck. [**Can we count on you to chip in $5 right now to defend this seat? We can 't let the Democrats flip this seat back to blue!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OoYtNsxchZ5YAXjgOrql400KMcQRJEFBMsMPSpZLOZEdihbtLhX3GpJHQl2FcXSbearh_S0MAjTBZRNE4t1wN3v8mPpfLTB_pq24PMJVC2eCkTJH9Dtt5pxIZqobkSJ2QtP3IBwW5vck74oYqM7Boqyf0GLAKwjl4c5MdsbAmWxgQ-NP0CxZrCRZwi3aFYRAMjWZcvxA1faaWdas2N4qHIjIAxGj49REfLmkRSqFd9U0jt5kjzTJTu12cph9wHCTZdF0OLhUKD54VO0nEJHhF33mSkLo3gMWzw6JF-jWnfnH2eBbqlblCuqq99P-iHv2pyP-3bViGU2TlqkrN0-ZaigRPuIIHxaGn8xQadBumG17lZZbUF2-JUi9XhGIa3g7ebYDZXqalu-j2K2L1X6V5c0tJ_GoqIAz7v5GDnov7spFUsb4cXUT5w==&c=6gh3MRehpU7nz5tdZBwfFbROsKD-JzvOcpMotV-bgIwfT6IaftDiaw==&ch=dJiuLy2QMnID-wHhUUM1jtq0ev9-SuHhmQIZuSANQD9G3YfChudnMw==)

I'm running for congress to fight for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. I'm an immigrant and proud conservative woman and I know what it's like to be targeted by Washington Democrats... They've spent the last 4 years and millions of dollars attacking me! That's why nothing they can do will scare me off or keep me from fighting for our common sense agenda.

Whether you're new to the team or have been here from the start, we would not be where we are without your support. We won because we built an incredible grassroots team capable of standing up to the Left's attacks. And we will win again because there is nothing more powerful than our grassroots.

Thank you for all that you do.

Young Kim

* * *

body:
Friend,

I served the great state of Georgia for over 20 years, so I know for a fact that Democrats are approaching both of the runoff Senate races there the **wrong way**.

Both Democrat candidates support radical ideas like the Green New Deal, lax immigration and border security policies, and even advocate for socialized medicine at the expense of the American taxpayer.

**Our country deserves better. Georgia deserves better. _As a California resident,_ I witnessed our economy almost be torn to shreds overnight due to the disastrous policies of AB 5.

_As a_ __Calif_ ornia small business owner,_ I have learned firsthand the burden of business-crushing regulations.

_As a California taxpayer,_ I have seen the struggles that come with making ends meet after paying the highest taxes in the nation.

_As a California patriot,_ I witnessed our nation's heroes in the Barstow Veterans Home devastated as Gavin Newsom threatened to shut them down.

body:

Friend,

Control of the Senate is still UNDECIDED. Two runoff elections in Georgia will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate.

If we lose, Chuck Schumer will be in charge of the Senate and there will be no stopping their radical plans.

[**If every grassroots patriot reading this email chips in just $10 to protect our Majority, we will have the resources to fight back and win.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/10-dollars-for-the-senate-majority/?amount=10/?utm_campaign=20201128_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1041761-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201128_first-name-just-asking-for-10)

subject: Your inaction is putting the Senate Majority at risk

body:
We are less than 72 HOURS AWAY from the FIRST end of month deadline before Georgia's critical Senate runoffs. Senate Republicans are still critically behind their goal, and they're counting on YOU to join this fight before it's too late.

Friend,

We are **less than 72 HOURS************AWAY** from the FIRST end of month deadline before Georgia's critical Senate runoffs.

Fellow Conservative, Conservatives David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler are in the midst of one of the most consequential runoff elections in American history -- the battle for our Senate majority. Now more than ever before it's important that conservatives stand united behind these two candidates. That's why we're asking you and 100,000 others to go on the record and endorse Perdue and Loeffler for Senate. | Signature Requested Deadline: 11:59 PM Tonight Goal: 100,000 E-Signatures | == Adding your name to the endorsement list is the single best thing you can do for our movement. name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Protect President Trump’s Legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need you to step up so the Republican Party can be successful in January, in 2022, and beyond!

Fellow Conservative,

This month started out with one of the craziest elections this country has ever seen. It is hard to believe that almost a month has passed since Election Day.

**But this election still isn 't over**. Key races in Georgia and recounts across America will be decided in January and we need to make sure we can do everything possible to make sure that President Trump's legacy is protected!

[**Protect Trump's Legacy**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001evEY-Rh4t0bYPHi-gbxMqyVc_5_11ZbUIwJdSaS6ADnufCW_mkGhEKnR5kwWtxx8CEo0sracgXTcIqOcECZKQhh35E2eL_CRg-Pn9qlFpXzzlzAFfKeJsGqHU9367ktNe96lrEWDCYgRCyOXBovTwKQbg_pxcWPnBFLBisr35f_jmeRTUOMbJ40OZSIed38jJ3Gti1Z8I0OBCqXudjS3yvn1CufSD0PGItmVNMC3lIMBZ6ud5a1eJyAA-0fFrIuQNz9-R5IhSe7SVnzaUMyp9Yc4eteKCRU-9zzcaD3KjAPEQXbLmsyoAMW22sQMumnysN4L23LCcR3uPmWAsHkCxoMpP7M3o2oZnZRo7gUKrjlrXM0i_XUdHHljO0pUy9vEEwXSS-f2jPhthrIWk1Us2lt-zyhTUtP_Pq6IR8Py3S4GTgohptLjfLcwTcOfQFIQ&c=NHkwCvvzdY4UtwRew2nGJVqsctXUHJkdBGyzeO-ZAP9GJhkLdPx51Q==&ch=U8neGedk2U7YeAhxN3Chl4vgNWAW9W9qCeJ5Ug0yQy_6Sw_5gDXehg==)

As conservatives fight to continue the work President Trump has accomplished, we must ensure that they have the resources to do so. That is why 500% MATCHING for all patriots who donate BEFORE MIDNIGHT has been unlocked.

President Trump has laid the groundwork for the Republican Party to be successful for years to come.

_**But that means nothing unless we have the resources to put plans into action! **_

[**We need you to step up so the Republican Party can be successful in January, in 2022, and beyond!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001evEY-Rh4t0bYPHi-gbxMqyVc_5_11ZbUIwJdSaS6ADnufCW_mkGhEKnR5kwWtxx8CEo0sracgXTcIqOcECZKQhh35E2eL_CRg-Pn9qlFpXzzlzAFfKeJsGqHU9367ktNe96lrEWDCYgRCyOXBovTwKQbg_pxcWPnBFLBisr35f_jmeRTUOMbJ40OZSIed38jJ3Gti1Z8I0OBCqXudjS3yvn1CufSD0PGItmVNMC3lIMBZ6ud5a1eJyAA-0fFrIuQNz9-R5IhSe7SVnzaUMyp9Yc4eteKCRU-9zzcaD3KjAPEQXbLmsyoAMW22sQMumnysN4L23LCcR3uPmWAsHkCxoMpP7M3o2oZnZRo7gUKrjlrXM0i_XUdHHljO0pUy9vEEwXSS-f2jPhthrIWk1Us2lt-zyhTUtP_Pq6IR8Py3S4GTgohptLjfLcwTcOfQFIQ&c=NHkwCvvzdY4UtwRew2nGJVqsctXUHJkdBGyzeO-ZAP9GJhkLdPx51Q==&ch=U8neGedk2U7YeAhxN3Chl4vgNWAW9W9qCeJ5Ug0yQy_6Sw_5gDXehg==)

Thank you for your continued support over the years!

Thank you,

Newt Gingrich

name: Steph (Team Steel)
subject: 3 days to make a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
I could come up with a million reasons why we need Michelle Steel -- a conservative fighter and California's Taxpayer Champion -- in Congress and why your support is critical, but if we had to narrow it down to my top five...

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H0D_FWo8OOUFyG6j5ZUSlmLdXNlj_9JmE7xCIxXuQEGjP9bjeIXb0HtTSVkYSRXvSmbSnAQoVgNgn30-7bWe7o0WGCF8wDivZI-LZwA6_hth1vSPDtmZcMDfH9RFr-pmTKMhGp6ESIcMlFEPtX4js2mOm1YmlVBneD6e7fnRBhBwIsk_UnE1P1fLyW4RhOYvl_5TsLeAjN4xPRUuZx65wth14hdmuf6_fuAPUz9oyRi8wTLIFfVz5i6GSCc-657slGDTe174zSVUY7PJ3G9MKIuWsZkbu6KUMw98O6A2eXFqDhg0qCwbXum4MRPsZNbFF0I9UX2thd0a67rtAfqw13sex_VsIWK4s_5QkoQ157qGViH_6QmQGjLeEu7PRHNgK9pgQlXnpqkAFfnH4yUiXdY9zTq30RQwc2aiCKfQkng=&c=31-BGVi-sWY22u6NDXYCiFDCQtbVu9ZHvdxJ_0nP1heacA__xAewkA==&ch=4lX37Y4qVrAry0X5hEg1NXLD95OGjWyLbZ_2fRRxYJFktdbbfKeBDA==) Friend,

I could come up with a million reasons why we need Michelle Steel -- a conservative fighter and California's Taxpayer Champion -- in Congress and why your support is critical, but if we had to narrow it down to my top five:
* Whoever wins this seat will determine who controls the House Majority.
* This seat was flipped BLUE in 2018, flipped RED in 2020, and remains a top-target on both sides
* We're going up against Pelosi's deep pockets and the Democrats' dark money machine. They spent millions against us in 2020 and will spend even more to defeat us in 2022.
* Pelosi's candidate -- the very same candidate we defeated -- is gunning for a rematch. With how close it was in 2020, we're in for the rematch of the decade.
* **Our critical End of Month deadline is just 2 days away.**

[**All this to say, we will not win without your help and in an election as important as this, every little bit counts. Can we count on you to chip in $10, $5, or even just $1 to get us where we need to be?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H0D_FWo8OOUFyG6j5ZUSlmLdXNlj_9JmE7xCIxXuQEGjP9bjeIXb0HtTSVkYSRXvSmbSnAQoVgNgn30-7bWe7o0WGCF8wDivZI-LZwA6_hth1vSPDtmZcMDfH9RFr-pmTKMhGp6ESIcMlFEPtX4js2mOm1YmlVBneD6e7fnRBhBwIsk_UnE1P1fLyW4RhOYvl_5TsLeAjN4xPRUuZx65wth14hdmuf6_fuAPUz9oyRi8wTLIFfVz5i6GSCc-657slGDTe174zSVUY7PJ3G9MKIuWsZkbu6KUMw98O6A2eXFqDhg0qCwbXum4MRPsZNbFF0I9UX2thd0a67rtAfqw13sex_VsIWK4s_5QkoQ157qGViH_6QmQGjLeEu7PRHNgK9pgQlXnpqkAFfnH4yUiXdY9zTq30RQwc2aiCKfQkng=&c=31-BGVi-sWY22u6NDXYCiFDCQtbVu9ZHvdxJ_0nP1heacA__xAewkA==&ch=4lX37Y4qVrAry0X5hEg1NXLD95OGjWyLbZ_2fRRxYJFktdbbfKeBDA==) Your contribution will have a direct impact on the future of the campaign and the decisions we make going forward.

Defending this seat from the Radical Left is directly tied to grassroots supporters like you. This fight isn't just about one seat -- it's about retaking the House Majority, the future of our nation, and putting an end to the Left's socialist agenda. It's about sending Michelle Steel -- the conservative fighter we need -- to Congress where she has pledged to fight against any new taxes and stop all tax increases.

Michelle Steel has dedicated her life to providing quick, common-sense reforms to all Californians. She's even led the fight to return millions to California taxpayers. Now she needs our help!

The House Majority is on the line. The stakes have never been higher, Friend, and it's going to be a fight to the finish: [**Can we count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can by midnight tonight to put us on the path to victory?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H0D_FWo8OOUFyG6j5ZUSlmLdXNlj_9JmE7xCIxXuQEGjP9bjeIXb0HtTSVkYSRXvSmbSnAQoVgNgn30-7bWe7o0WGCF8wDivZI-LZwA6_hth1vSPDtmZcMDfH9RFr-pmTKMhGp6ESIcMlFEPtX4js2mOm1YmlVBneD6e7fnRBhBwIsk_UnE1P1fLyW4RhOYvl_5TsLeAjN4xPRUuZx65wth14hdmuf6_fuAPUz9oyRi8wTLIFfVz5i6GSCc-657slGDTe174zSVUY7PJ3G9MKIuWsZkbu6KUMw98O6A2eXFqDhg0qCwbXum4MRPsZNbFF0I9UX2thd0a67rtAfqw13sex_VsIWK4s_5QkoQ157qGViH_6QmQGjLeEu7PRHNgK9pgQlXnpqkAFfnH4yUiXdY9zTq30RQwc2aiCKfQkng=&c=31-BGVi-sWY22u6NDXYCiFDCQtbVu9ZHvdxJ_0nP1heacA__xAewkA==&ch=4lX37Y4qVrAry0X5hEg1NXLD95OGjWyLbZ_2fRRxYJFktdbbfKeBDA==)

Thank you,

Steph
Team Steel

| Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress

\------Begin Forwarded Message------ Subject: We must keep the Senate red. From: Matt Gaetz <[info@mattgaetz.com](mailto:info@mattgaetz.com)> Date: Tuesday, November 24, 2020 at 6:37 PM

Peter,
Control of the US Senate will come down to the two runoff elections in Georgia. With a Democrat majority in the House and Joe Biden headed toward the Oval Office, the Senate will be our last line of defense against a complete Democrat takeover.
We can't let the Democrats take a supermajority. I am going to fight to the end to save our country from the dangerous policies set forth by the Democrat Party, but it's going to take the efforts of Patriots like you!
---

name: Team Warner
subject: Your weekly update.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9bd/53d9897e/550468e6/1c88d304/2583366140/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Dear Derek --

We hope this email finds you safe and healthy and that you had a good holiday. Celebrations looked a bit different this year as we continue to social distance to keep our loved ones and everyone around us safe, but we hope you were able to connect with loved ones virtually, and we look forward to a time when we can all be together safely. Our team is committed to sending updates so every Virginian knows what Mark Warner is working on in the Senate.

**Here 's the latest:**
* Mark joined Senator Tim Kaine in pushing Congress to take action to **[protect funding for critical black lung benefits for miners.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9bd/53d9897e/550468e6/1c88d303/2583366140/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://wcyb.com/news/local/warner-kaine-supporting-tax-rate-extender-for-black-lung-disability-trust-fund")** The funding that Warner and Kaine secured last year can be crucial to miners accessing the health care they need, and Mark is working hard to ensure this funding is extended.

* **[Legislation that Mark introduced to combat money laundering and terrorist financing was included](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9bd/53d9897e/550468e6/1c88d302/2583366140/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-national-security-legislation-included-in-senate-defense-funding-bill/")** in this year's National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA). Mark's bi-partisan _Improving Laundering Laws and Increasing Comprehensive Information Tracking of Criminal Activity in Shell Holdings Act_ (ILLICIT CASH Act) aims to strengthen national security, increase corporate accountability, and aid law enforcement in tracking the financial activity of criminal groups.

* **[Mark kept the pressure on the head of the General Services Administration (GSA) to allow the Biden administration to begin the transition process](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9bd/53d9897e/550468e6/1c88d301/2583366140/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-delay-in-presidential-transition-puts-u-s-in-danger/")** ahead of President-elect Biden's inauguration in January, stressing that delaying the transition was a risk to our national security. The GSA has since allowed the transition to proceed.

* **[Mark praised President-elect Biden's potential nominee for Director of National Intelligence,](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9bd/53d9897e/550468e6/1c88d300/2583366140/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://fcnp.com/2020/11/23/sen-warner-hails-prospect-of-haines-appointment-as-dni/")** Avril Haines, saying Haines is "smart and capable" and would be well-equipped to begin repairing damage done to the agency during the Trump Administration.

* Mark called on IRS Commissioner Charles Rettig and Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services Administrator Seema Verma to **[fix a tax issue that prevents families from enrolling in the Affordable Care Act (ACA),](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9bd/53d9897e/550468e6/1c88d30f/2583366140/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-pushes-administration-to-fix-tax-issue-preventing-families-from-enrolling-in-aca/")** ahead of the enrollment deadline on 12/15. Warner fears that families will be denied because of delayed processing of 2019 tax returns, and is working to ensure that every Virginian -- and every American -- has access to the health care they need.

* **[Mark worked with Senator Tim Kaine to introduce legislation to protect non-partisan civil servants with policy expertise.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9bd/53d9897e/550468e6/1c88d30e/2583366140/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "http://bristowbeat.com/news/virginia-senators-introduce-legislation-protect-non-partisan-civil-servants/")** This bill would block an October Executive Order that would make it easier for the Trump administration to fire these federal employees.

Be well,

Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9bd/53d9897e/550468e6/1c88d30d/2583366140/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk0OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20201128_e_1_fl__948__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9bd/53d9897e/550468e6/1c88d30c/2583366140/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Happy Small Business Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
It’s Small Biz Saturday in Indiana, and that means it’s time to celebrate all of the incredible entrepreneurs and small business owners who make up... | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0151f3757283421a83c117a4f4491da3&_e=ARxxI-G0Sm7rNtfkwaQARKgpIWw5w_NvZJD3Ku3L6A0m8BjMl0AQx9dMoBTuofcqhK5wYltuMd1kP6grCjpAsl-LXxdMiiEwP63bQOladhNXzJyIrg795Hw0G1sHVym3PU2Vzqvq4C-zd2f23afy0y-RPRkgKQXGZToSKOai5bEKK_0GvsCqK0noOS2LvAfq36RQ6ZgbY9hSYS1_MmO-DvucW0LLSeg4TEwtLmza5qANEymVFioDNq6mnrQ7kxgHf8y_1WVJeGJXZCIxorThKorDAr9l7bi_uZwzAfMhwKg6Z8F12iK4N77GSR0Nz1JmQBxlQargiHoBoveS-Y7BQYYptlWR6Uh07MbOAGFq8wLJitjoJhcov2mvSPcSBRMIE9tFi-UzmyA5vSRLpIcJAPlotG6m2nEjF4HLKHCD905p1JMjICQehB5hl1LBL-7dru8k4soxjFAVEYQT0x6o3jkAhqN2pRIAVMujOgxBKYsC6yGGxI9pjI_kt_j1zeRu) |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

It’s Small Biz Saturday in Indiana, and that means it’s time to celebrate all of the incredible entrepreneurs and small business owners who make up the economic backbone of our communities.

This year, they need our support more than ever.

Friend, the restaurants, bars, breweries, stores, and more that make up our small business community have been under a lot of pressure this year. The COVID-19 pandemic has taken its toll on Hoosier small businesses and the more than a million Hoosiers who are employed by them.

But despite facing all of this adversity, they have stepped up when we needed them. They’ve delivered us take out, kept their doors open so we could get necessary supplies, and kept our communities running.

Do you have a story you want to share about a small business that has stepped up to help your community during this difficult time? Share below!
|
---
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0151f3757283421a83c117a4f4491da3&_e=ARxxI-G0Sm7rNtfkwaQARKgpIWw5w_NvZJD3Ku3L6A0m8BjMl0AQx9dMoBTuofcqhK5wYltuMd1kP6grCjpAsl-LXxdMiiEwP63bQOladhNXzJyIrg795Hw0G1sHVym3PU2Vzqvq4C-zd2f23afy0y-RPRkgKQXGZToSKOai5bEKK_0GvsCqK0noOS2LvAfq36RQ6ZgbY9hSYS1_MmO-DvucW0LLSeg4TEwtLmza5qANEymVFioDNq6mnrQ7kxgHf8y_1WVJeGJXZCIxorThKofsX53d8JaupUX_jRs3ZgYZ4RfBcy6TltKa-LOY6ya1hQwNGl1XbTLhYi6sh75L0AjDZ70AIe-AFhXXMyL9wNatDgnrRBBcay27sFWH1znhgfLXPh3RjiswxJH7e19SO75Q3US3JUpw6yUsMO8bMLYqWIyqXpeRdKK54i5s9NtEBofvw9AzZlS8kclMW7YjwQBMifrL3w_Ydh3UOKqYlSvMo0bYgg_Gas_EovL14DcD)
|
---
Friend, our small businesses have been there for us, and we need to be there for them. So if you can, please be sure to safely support a small business in your community.

Thanks for reading,

Holcomb Crew
---
---
|
|

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SATURDAY, NOVEMBER 28, 2020 PHOTO RELEASE: KELLY LOEFFLER MAKES CAMPAIGN STOPS IN NORTH GEORGIA
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler traveled to North Georgia for two campaign stops. She started the day in Jasper - where Representative Doug Collins (R-GA) - who endorsed Senator Loeffler on election night - joined her to meet supporters - before heading to Ringgold for another stop. Today's events highlight the strong Republican momentum, unity, and energy ahead of the January 5th runoff.

It’s Small Business Saturday here in South Carolina! **That means it’s time to celebrate the restaurants, bars, and stores that make up the economic heartbeat of the Lowcountry. ** _Our small businesses have been through a lot this year — they’ve been hit harder than most as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic, and many businesses in the Lowcountry are still struggling to keep their doors open. _ They’ve been there for us every step of the way during this pandemic — bringing takeout to people’s doors, making sure that we can safely go shopping for essentials, and keeping thousands of people employed in our district. Friend, they’ve been nothing short of heroic. In order to celebrate Small Business Saturday, we’re asking our grassroots community to share the stories of the small businesses that have stepped for our community during COVID-19.

subject: EXCLUSIVE FIRST LOOK: New Ad Highlights Perdue’s Commitment To Supporting Small Businesses And Hopeful Vision For Our Future
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dbc3d0223db4/watch-senator-david-perdue-on-fox-news-georgia-is-the-last-line-of-defense-66431?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| _**EXCLUSIVE FIRST LOOK: New Ad Highlights Perdue’s Commitment To Supporting Small Businesses And Hopeful Vision For Our Future**_
Folks -

As our biggest supporters, we wanted you to have an exclusive first look at our latest ad, “Even Stronger”.

David Perdue first ran for the United States Senate six years ago because he believed that his experience of turning around businesses would be helpful to turning around our then-lagging economy. Georgians agreed -- and Republicans soon delivered the greatest economic comeback in our nation's history.

COVID hit hard this year, and now Americans need another comeback. Senator Perdue will help lead the way.

**Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9176a69267&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch and share the ad. **
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=68293d164c&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **TRANSCRIPT**

**PERDUE:**_“I never wanted to be in politics, but, six years ago our economy was a mess. I thought my background, turning around Reebok and Dollar General, might help. You agreed. We built the greatest economic turnaround in U.S. history. Record jobs. Then, came COVID. We'll beat this virus, get our lives back to normal and come back even stronger. America always does.” _

**Help us[share](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=3b8c2cd495&e=02cd889ad3) Senator Perdue's positive vision for America. Facebook has banned us from advertising, so we need your help. Text or email this to a friend or post it on Facebook. **
###

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Larvita Defied the Governor and Opened Up
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=larvita_on_fox_frien&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Larvita opened up her business last night in defiance of Tyrant Walz and in the face of threats of imprisonment from Attorney General Keith Ellison.** Action 4 Liberty's team were on the phones this week calling patriots in the area to rally behind Larvita. Thank you to everyone who made the trip down to Lynd, MN to show your support. Larvita could not be more thankful for your commitment to expanding liberty. Larvita's heroic act landed her a spot on Fox & Friends this morning: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/larvita_on_fox_friends?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=larvita_on_fox_frien&n=2) At this point, Walz and Ellison's threats appear to be a bluff. No law enforcement resources came to Havens Garden last night and the AG's office did not get an injunction against her. Larvita's courageous act is powerful and will spread like brushfires of freedom in this state...and country. Now we've learned another heroic story is emerging on the other side of the state. Iraq war veteran and small business owner, Brandon Reiter, is [opening his gym](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=If7BzFCCMUPWEcoQIGjsiXTjJRoiL_iS3hT7u5AWYgXjJZbPrTY5OFxrLBcmCFkTDnjoJTVQeP84hfzqFc5BOCAPEkNIJbUGm5sn67yoJKHvASkFBRBcZuH6di1ekH3M&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=larvita_on_fox_frien&n=3) in Plainview, MN in defiance of Tyrant Walz too! **Brandon proudly served his country overseas and took his oath of office seriously. He refuses to let the Governor's illegal orders ruin the business he created. We all know business owners like Brandon can open up in a safe and reasonable way.** It's time governement gets out of our way. It time our politicians take their oaths seriously too. Where are the heroic state senators at the Capitol who are willing to stand up for Larvita and Brandon? The Republican controlled Senate thinks they can avoid voting on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers when they meet again in December. What a shame! We must put the pressure on legislators to END these Illegal Emergency Powers once and for all! Action 4 Liberty will continue mobilizing activists and bringing the heat on the political class. This fight is too important to allow failure. We simply MUST win!
## [SIGN THE PETITION](https://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=larvita_on_fox_frien&n=4)
**In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=larvita_on_fox_frien&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=larvita_on_fox_frien&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=larvita_on_fox_frien&n=7), software for leaders.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Shop Small
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
If you're holiday shopping this Small Business Saturday (or any day), please consider doing it locally.
Hi there,
I hope you had a safe and meaningful Thanksgiving full of warmth and gratitude. Like so many others, our family kept it small this year to help stop the spread of COVID-19. Tom, Ben, Meg and I enjoyed one another's company and dropped food off to some of our extended family who, in a more typical year, would have been with us to carve the turkey.
But COVID-19 has done much more than disrupted our Thanksgiving traditions. It has turned life upside down for restaurant workers, small business owners, and so many more. That's why this year, I encourage you to shop small and support New Hampshire's many talented entrepreneurs and local businesses.
WMUR has pulled together a searchable list of small businesses and crafters - and if your place of work isn't on there, you can get in touch with them to have it added. [**Click here to give it a read.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc64b/2a380d31/21fa77e0/f05cf6/1101248781/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://www.wmur.com/article/open-for-business-shop-local-for-the-holidays/34761550")
If you're holiday shopping this Small Business Saturday (or any day), please consider doing it locally.
Happy holidays and stay safe.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc64b/2a380d31/21fa77e0/f05cf7/1101248781/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEyOF9zaG9wc21hbGxfcmVtIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20201128_shopsmall_rem&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

clean_body: If you're holiday shopping this Small Business Saturday (or any day), please consider doing it locally. Hi there, I hope you had a safe and meaningful Thanksgiving full of warmth and gratitude. Like so many others, our family kept it small this year to help stop the spread of COVID-19. Tom, Ben, Meg and I enjoyed one another's company and dropped food off to some of our extended family who, in a more typical year, would have been with us to carve the turkey. But COVID-19 has done much more than disrupted our Thanksgiving traditions. It has turned life upside down for restaurant workers, small business owners, and so many more. That's why this year, I encourage you to shop small and support New Hampshire's many talented entrepreneurs and local businesses. WMUR has pulled together a searchable list of small businesses and crafters - and if your place of work isn't on there, you can get in touch with them to have it added. "" If you're holiday shopping this Small Business Saturday (or any day), please consider doing it locally. Happy holidays and stay safe. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan "" _
